title: Uruguayan Grilled Tuna Skewers
description: A simple and flavorful keto recipe inspired by Uruguayan cuisine, featuring grilled tuna skewers with a crispy twist.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together parsley, lime zest, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
3. Brush tuna steaks with olive oil and season with the parsley mixture.
4. Thread tuna steaks onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
5. Grill skewers for 4-5 minutes per side, or until tuna reaches 145°F.
6. Meanwhile, grill red pepper slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred.
7. Once tuna is cooked, top each skewer with a grilled red pepper slice.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
